players_detected.apparel_summary: Grey hoodie, dark shorts, white socks, white shoes
White t-shirt, dark shorts, white socks, white shoes
Grey t-shirt, dark shorts, white socks, white shoes

skill_indicators.signature_move_detected: Exceptional dink control and consistency at the kitchen line, patiently waiting for an opening.
tactical_tendencies: Prefers to keep the ball low and in the kitchen
Waits for opponent errors or weak returns
improvement_opportunities: Incorporate more aggressive speed-ups when opportunities arise
Develop a more potent third-shot drop to gain net advantage
Vary shot placement more effectively to pull opponents out of position

brand_detection.unidentified_equipment_notes: One player on the far side is wearing a grey hoodie that is not clearly branded.
brand_detection.unidentified_products_notes: Water bottles are visible on the sideline but brands are not discernible.

paddle_intel.notes: The primary player is using a JOOLA paddle, consistent with their apparel.

storytelling.narrative_arc_summary: A patient rally at the kitchen line showcases exceptional dinking consistency and tactical awareness.

predicted_badges.reasoning: The rally exceeded 15 shots, indicating sustained play.
Multiple players executed numerous quality dinks at the kitchen line.
The primary player maintained a high level of consistency throughout the rally without apparent errors.
The rally was exceptionally long, demonstrating sustained play.
The rally was dominated by dinks, with players demonstrating excellent control.

badge_trigger_moments: The sustained dink rally at the net.
The primary player's consistent placement and control of their dinks.

commentary.neutral_announcer_espn: We're witnessing a masterclass in dink control here. The players are exchanging soft shots at the net, patiently probing for an opening. This is a true test of patience and precision.
commentary.hype_announcer_charged: WOAH! Look at this kitchen battle! These players are trading dinks like they're playing ping pong! Nobody wants to make the first mistake! This is pure pickleball artistry!
commentary.coaching_breakdown: Notice how they're keeping the ball low and in the kitchen. The key here is consistency and placement. They're not trying to win the point outright, but rather to force an error or create a weak return. Keep your paddle up, eyes on the ball, and wait for your moment.
commentary.ron_burgundy_voice: Well, well, well. It appears we have a situation here. A prolonged exchange of tiny, delicate shots. It's like watching two very polite people argue over who gets the last cookie. Fascinating. Truly fascinating.
commentary.chuck_norris_voice: Chuck Norris doesn't play pickleball. Pickleball plays Chuck Norris. But if he did, he'd win every point with a single, perfectly placed dink.
commentary.color_commentator_banter: You know, I've seen some dink rallies, but this one is special. It's like they're having a conversation with their paddles. 'After you.' 'No, after you.'
commentary.announcement_text_for_tts: We are witnessing a prolonged and highly consistent dink rally at the kitchen line. The players are demonstrating exceptional control and patience, exchanging soft shots and waiting for an offensive opportunity.

daas_signals.clip_summary_one_sentence: Players engage in a lengthy, consistent dink rally at the kitchen line.
